encounter:
It appears the time has finally come once again.
You know why you have come here, do you not?$You were drawn here, because you have been here before.
Countless times.$Though, perhaps it can be counted.
To be precise, this is in fact your {{cycleCount}} cycle.$Each cycle your mind reverts to its former state.
Even so, somehow, remnants of your former selves remain.$Until now you have yet to succeed, but I sense a different presence in you this time.$You are the only one here, though it is as if there is… another.$Will you finally prove a formidable challenge to me?
The challenge I have longed after for millennia?$We begin.
encounter_female:
It appears the time has finally come once again.
You know why you have come here, do you not?$You were drawn here, because you have been here before.
Countless times.$Though, perhaps it can be counted.
To be precise, this is in fact your {{cycleCount}} cycle.$Each cycle your mind reverts to its former state.
Even so, somehow, remnants of your former selves remain.$Until now you have yet to succeed, but I sense a different presence in you this time.$You are the only one here, though it is as if there is… another.$Will you finally prove a formidable challenge to me?
The challenge I have longed after for millennia?$We begin.
firstStageWin:
I see. The presence I felt was indeed real.
It appears I no longer need to hold back.$Do not disappoint me.
necrozmaEncounter:
What... what is this place? This world? These... worlds?
Hundreds, thousands, millions?$A thousand million suns to consume. An endless feast.
The light, so beautiful... I must have it.$I shall consume it all, till none shine as brightly as I.$An unending feast, and all that stands in my way is...$You.
necrozmaFirstStageWin: No... This is... I cannot... so close... so...$I... refuse... This place, these worlds, are mine.$Stand now, in my Radiance, and be consumed by it.
necrozmaSecondStageWin: ... The light, why, how does it fade?
arceusEncounter:
I wondered when you would arrive.$You have followed the fracture through battle, storm, and ruin.
You have faced what no life was made to face.$I have seen it in your eyes, determined, weary.
Worn down by events of which even I have no recollection.$It was your condition that drew my sight to this place.$For that, I thank you. I know not how this has
evaded my sight for so long.$But your work is over, child. Go, rest.
I will set things right.$You will leave, and when dawn comes all of this shall
fade as if distant dream.$...You refuse?$Of course, you must have struggled for so long to reach
this very point. Do you fear me incapable of this?$Then I shall set your fears to rest, and turn you back myself.
arceusFirstStageWin:
Enough.$You still stand?
Even now before my judgement?$I see now. This is not defiance alone.
Though your mind is frayed your will is ironclad.$How many times have you forged onward? Hundreds? Thousands? Millions?
Your determination drives you forward when all else is distant memory.$Do you remember your mother's name?
The region you call home?
The professor who gave you your first Pokemon?
Do you even recall who that Pokemon was?$No... I thought not...$I pity you, human. And I am sorry that I have failed you for so long.
Lay your stubborn will to rest {{playerName}}$For you stand before the Original One.
And I shall not fail you again.
arceusSecondStageWin:
Impossible...
No. It is, very human to do impossible things.$Your kind is blessed with unmatched resilience.
And too little common sense.$Very well {{playerName}}. Let us set this right.
Together.
mewEncounter:
There you are, Hey! Listen! Hello!
Wait up a second will you?.$Step, battle, step, battle, step, battle...
Do you even know where you are anymore?$I watched you march through forests without touching grass.
Sail the oceans without tasting the salt.$Stomp through cities without meeting a single pair of eyes.$You do not laugh at the rain.
You do not flinch at thunder.$You did not even smile when the sun broke through.$And oh boy have I tried!$A storm here, a rainbow there.$A Slowbro I convinced to wear the
funniest hat i could find!$A dozen little jokes between one fight and the next...$Nothing.
You just kept walking.$Do you know how rude that is?
This world is alive, {{playerName}}.$It sings. It sparkles. It trips over itself trying to surprise you.
And you ignored all of it with that blank expression of yours.$So no. No more marching forward.
If you will not stop on your own...$Then I will turn you around myself!$You are going back.$Back through every field, every storm, every silly little miracle
you were too stubborn to see. Its time to stop and smell the roses!
mewSecondStageWin:
You... still want to go forward?$After all that?$I threw legends at you.
I shook the sky, split the sea, painted the clouds...$And you kept looking past me.$No...$No, not ignoring me.
You just weren't surprised at all.$You are not ignoring the world.
You have just seen it all before, haven't you.$How many times have you seen this place, {{playerName}}?$How many first steps became chores?
How many miracles became predictable?$Oh, little human...$I thought you had forgotten how to care.
But your just too focused on something else.$...Fine.$I wont stop you now, but when your done I
expect you to pay me a visit!$I will be waiting!
